headline: Qualcomm Snap AR Eyewear Deal Highlights Wearables Growth And Valuation Upside
summary: Qualcomm and Snap's Specs unit have agreed a multi year partnership to use Snapdragon chips in future AR eyewear. The deal centers on a flagship line of standalone AR smart glasses that will combine Snapdragon XR platforms with advanced AI and graphics. The collaboration deepens an existing relationship between the two companies and targets broader consumer adoption of AR hardware. For investors watching NasdaqGS:QCOM, this move highlights how Qualcomm is trying to extend its chip platforms...

headline: Qualcomm's CEO Says the Winner of Edge AI Will Win the Entire AI Race. Here's Why I'm Buying.
summary: Qualcomm isn't just a smartphone chip company anymore. It's positioning itself to be a key player in edge AI, and its valuation doesn't yet reflect that transformation.
